welcome.eyebrow: de jashan vich tuhadda swaagat hai
welcome.landingText: Aj raat layi ik chhota photo space.
welcome.landingSubText: Ik vaar install karo, fer home screen ton khol ke full experience lo.
welcome.installHint: Wiah wali app nu home screen te rakho, taan experience smooth rahe.
welcome.installDescription: Tuhada browser eh app ithe hi install kar sakda hai.
welcome.iosInstallHint: iPhone te share sheet kholo te Add to Home Screen chuno.
welcome.iosStepOne: Safari vich Share button te tap karo.
welcome.greetingText: Assi tuhanu dekh ke bahut khush haan.
welcome.greetingSubText: Apna naam add karo taan jo tuhade photos poori raat tuhade naal jure rahen.
welcome.noteTwo: Tusi har photo te ik note v jod sakde ho.

instructions.eyebrow: Shuru karan ton pehlan kujh gallan
instructions.body: Tusi raat ton 20 tak photoan share kar sakde ho. Har yaad jo tusi post karoge, oh ithhe sab lai dikhdi hai, taan ke jashan sanjha te pyara bane.
instructions.notes: Hune photo lo ya baad vich upload karo.

app.placeholder: Sanjhian yaadan jaldi ithe nazar aaungan.
app.linkPrompt: Apna naam greeting vich pao taan jo photoan tuhade naal juriyaan hon.
